Veterans Benefits: Indiana exempts military pay and retired pay from state income tax and offers disabled-veteran property-tax deductions, education and tuition assistance, military plates, hunting and fishing licenses, and state park privileges for qualifying veterans.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 + MAP Indiana Equality Profile 2026
Description: Large northeast Indiana city with a local VA medical center, comparatively affordable housing, riverfront parks, museums, golf, and a regional aerospace and defense cluster. Fort Wayne offers strong healthcare and cultural amenities for its cost, while safety varies by neighborhood and the county-level presidential baseline remains conservative despite a Democratic shift since 2016.
